system.description:
This spell creates a nonmagical item of vegetable, stone, crystal, metal or gem matter. The volume of the item created cannot exceed 1 cubic foot per caster level. The caster must succeed at an intelligence check to make a complex item. The duration of the created item varies with its relative hardness and rarity: vegetable matter lasts 2 hours/level; stone, crystal and base metals last 1 hour/level; precious metals last 20 minutes/level; gems last 10 minutes/level; mithral lasts 2 rounds/level; adamantite lasts 1 round/level.

The material component for this spell is ghost's breath.
